title: peucedanum junceum
intro: Peucedanum junceum, also known as Chinese angelica-root, is a type of plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Peucedanum junceum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Peucedanum junceum can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusing it in hot water to make a tea, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
